title: SpaghettiTrees
description: Mildly cursed custom tree/forest generation mod for Fabric/Quilt
body:
# SpaghettiTrees
Mildly cursed Fabric mod that changes oak and birch generation as well as adding dead trees, dead logs, stumps and bushes to Forest and Birch Forest biomes.

**Requires Quilt/Fabric Loader.**

**1.3.0 alpha 3 and later require Cloth Config API (6.2.62 or later).**
**Mod Menu is recommended for 1.3.0 alpha 3 and later.**
